source_title: What's the difference between Microsoft Copilot (free) and Copilot in Microsoft 365
claim: Microsoft's Copilot support page (last updated April 2026) describes a three-tier structure: Microsoft Copilot (free) at copilot.microsoft.com with no sign-in required; Copilot Chat automatically included for organizations with an eligible Microsoft 365 license; and Microsoft 365 Copilot as a paid add-on license adding advanced AI grounded on work data (files, emails, chats) and reasoning agents like Researcher and Analyst.
research_implication: Confirms Microsoft monetizes consumer/business AI through bundling and a paid add-on layered on existing Microsoft 365 relationships rather than a standalone consumer subscription, supporting the strategic-subsidy/hybrid hypothesis.
